summary: Completed testing of Account Mapping feature. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 8 test scenarios passed (100%). All features fully functional.

backend_account_mappings_api.GET /api/account-mappings/categories: PASSED - Returns 11 financial categories with correct structure (key, label, group, description)
backend_account_mappings_api.GET /api/account-mappings: PASSED - Returns all saved mappings for company
backend_account_mappings_api.POST /api/account-mappings: PASSED - Creates new mapping, validates target_category, returns 400 for invalid category
backend_account_mappings_api.PUT /api/account-mappings/{id}: PASSED - Updates target category, returns 404 for non-existent
backend_account_mappings_api.DELETE /api/account-mappings/{id}: PASSED - Removes mapping, returns 404 for non-existent
backend_account_mappings_api.POST /api/account-mappings/auto-detect: PASSED - Returns suggestions with confidence scores, correctly maps income categories to 'ingresos'

frontend_account_mapping_panel.auto_detect_button: PASSED - data-testid='auto-detect-btn' works, triggers API call
frontend_account_mapping_panel.suggestions_display: PASSED - Shows suggestions with source → target dropdown and confidence badge (90%, 80%, 30%)
frontend_account_mapping_panel.apply_all_button: PASSED - data-testid='apply-all-suggestions' visible when suggestions present
frontend_account_mapping_panel.apply_single_suggestion: PASSED - Checkmark button applies individual suggestion, removes from list
frontend_account_mapping_panel.saved_mappings_display: PASSED - Shows 'Mapeos Configurados' with editable dropdown and delete button
frontend_account_mapping_panel.editable_dropdown: PASSED - Dropdown shows all 11 financial categories for editing
frontend_account_mapping_panel.financial_categories_legend: PASSED - Shows all 11 categories with icons at bottom of panel

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. 1 mapping pre-existing (Proveedores Costo → costo_ventas). Created and deleted 'Ventas → ingresos' during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Account Mapping feature fully tested. Key data-testids: account-mapping-panel, auto-detect-btn, apply-all-suggestions, mapping-{id}. Backend endpoints: /api/account-mappings/categories (11 categories), /api/account-mappings (CRUD), /api/account-mappings/auto-detect (suggestions with confidence). Financial categories: ingresos, otros_ingresos, costo_ventas, gastos_venta, gastos_administracion, gastos_generales, gastos_financieros, otros_gastos, impuestos, depreciacion, amortizacion. Auto-detect correctly maps income categories to 'ingresos' (not gastos_venta). alegra_financials.py uses custom mappings before keyword heuristic.

account_mapping_panel.title: Mapeo de Cuentas Contables
account_mapping_panel.auto_detect: Returns suggestions based on category names with confidence scores
account_mapping_panel.suggestions: Shows source → target dropdown, confidence badge, apply button
account_mapping_panel.saved_mappings: Shows source_value, integration, source_type, editable target dropdown, delete button
account_mapping_panel.categories_legend: Shows all 11 financial categories with icons

backend_integration.custom_mappings_used: alegra_financials.py loads custom mappings first, then falls back to keyword heuristic
backend_integration.income_fix: Auto-detect correctly identifies income categories (tipo='ingreso') and maps to 'ingresos'
